## What changed

Describe the public-safe method, template, example, or wording change.

## Public-safe boundary

- [ ] No private scripts, raw media, provider/account state, customer material,
      local workspace paths, credentials, or final acceptance truth.
- [ ] Synthetic or self-owned examples are clearly labeled.
- [ ] Claims are scoped to method structure, not client outcomes or final
      artifact acceptance.

## Review checklist

- [ ] Links work.
- [ ] The change helps a reader make a better first decision.
- [ ] The README, template index, or case index is updated if needed.
